query:
SELECT
                    access_logs.access_log_id AS access_log_id,
                    access_logs.user_id AS user_id,
                    access_logs.request AS request,
                    access_logs.created_at AS created_at
                FROM access_logs
                WHERE access_logs.user_id = ?3
                ORDER BY access_log_id ASC
                LIMIT ?1 OFFSET ?2
